problem.passage:
1. Read the conversation and follow the directions.【2 points】
T : Today, we are going to read a text about cooking. Are you
interested in cooking?
Ss: Yeah.
T : Great. Let’s study today’s key words first. (The teacher
brings out kitchen utensils from a box.) I brought some
cooking utensils.
S1: Wow! Are those yours?
T : Yes, they are. I use them when I cook. (showing a
saucepan) You’ve seen this before, right?
S2: Yes. My mom uses that when she makes jam.
T : Good. Do you know what it’s called in English?
S3: It’s a saucepan.
T : Excellent, it’s a saucepan. Everyone, repeat after me.
Saucepan.
Ss: Saucepan.
T : And, (showing a cutting board) what’s this in English?
S4: A board?
T : Right, it’s a cutting board. Good job. I also brought a
couple of things from my refrigerator. This is one of my
favorite vegetables. (The teacher holds up an eggplant.)
S5: Umm.... It’s an egg...
T : Nice try! It’s an eggplant.
Note: T = teacher, S = student
Fill in the blank with the ONE most appropriate word.
In this lesson, the teacher is using a type of supplementary
materials called to teach key vocabulary.
Along with other visuals, these materials are expected to
attract students’ attention and to aid understanding and
retention of vocabulary.
영 어 [전공A]
임용후보자 선정경쟁시험
어
성 명 : ( )
12문항 40점 시험 시간 90분
